serp_overlap_matrix.methodology: Pairwise WebSearch comparison. Count shared unique root domains in top-10 organic results (excluding Google properties, directories). Score 7-10 = same post; 4-6 = same cluster; 2-3 = interlink; 0-1 = separate.

clusters.rationale: Lowest national competition due to city-specific modifier. No local competitor has fully built out this sub-cluster. Directly answers the question that precedes a booking.

hub_post.title: How Often Should You Detail Your Car in Bakersfield, CA?
primary_keywords: how often should you detail your car
how often should I get my car detailed
secondary_keywords: how often to wash car in Bakersfield
best time to get car detailed Bakersfield
hub_post.conversion_hook: Metro offers mobile detailing on a recurring schedule. Book and skip the guesswork.

spokes.title: Why Does Your Car Get So Dirty So Fast in Bakersfield?
primary_keywords: why does my car get dirty so fast Bakersfield
why cars get dirty in Bakersfield
spokes.conversion_hook: Valley dust is abrasive. Mobile detailing removes it safely so you're not grinding it into your paint.
spokes.competition_gap: PrestoPrecision has one post on dusty roads but it is thin. This post goes deeper with specific Bakersfield environmental context.

spokes.title: Best Time of Year to Get Your Car Detailed in Bakersfield
primary_keywords: best time to get car detailed Bakersfield
when to get car detailed Bakersfield
spokes.conversion_hook: Pre-summer ceramic coating appointment slots fill fast. Book now.
spokes.competition_gap: Zero direct competition for this specific query in Bakersfield.

clusters.rationale: High search volume nationally; Bakersfield angle reduces competition. Directly educates on Metro's highest-ticket add-ons (ceramic coating, clay bar, water spot removal).

hub_post.title: Ceramic Coating vs. Wax: Which Is Better for Bakersfield's Heat?
primary_keywords: car wax vs ceramic coating which is better
ceramic coating vs wax hot weather
secondary_keywords: how long does ceramic coating last
hub_post.conversion_hook: Metro applies professional ceramic coatings at your home. No drop-off required.
hub_post.cannibalization_risk: low - PrestoPrecision has a version of this. Compete with local depth and E-E-A-T.
hub_post.notes: Include Bakersfield-specific data: 270+ sunny days, 100F+ summers, agricultural contamination layered on paint.

what is clay bar detailing
spokes.conversion_hook: Clay bar decontamination is included in Metro's Full Detail and Refresh Detail packages.

spokes.title: How to Remove Water Spots from Your Car (Bakersfield Hard Water Guide)
primary_keywords: water spot removal car
how to remove water spots from car
hard water spots on car paint
spokes.conversion_hook: Metro offers professional water spot removal as an $100 add-on. Save your paint from etching.
spokes.competition_gap: Bakersfield has exceptionally hard water (San Joaquin Valley groundwater). No local competitor has a post targeting this specific angle.

spokes.title: How to Protect Your Car's Paint from Bakersfield Sun, Heat, and Dust
primary_keywords: how to protect car paint from sun damage
how to protect car from Bakersfield dust
spokes.conversion_hook: Professional detail + ceramic coating is the most effective protection available in Bakersfield's climate.

clusters.rationale: Targets pre-booking research queries. Educates on what Metro offers and removes hesitation. 'What is a full detail' has consistent national search volume.

hub_post.title: What Is a Full Detail? Everything That's Included (And Why It's Worth It)
primary_keywords: what is a full detail
what is included in a full detail
hub_post.conversion_hook: Metro's Full Detail is $400 and covers everything in this post, at your home or office.
hub_post.cannibalization_risk: none - service page targets 'full detail Bakersfield CA' (commercial), this post targets what-is (informational)

spokes.title: Mobile Detailing vs. Car Wash: What's the Actual Difference?
primary_keywords: mobile detailing vs car wash difference
mobile car wash vs car detailing
spokes.conversion_hook: A car wash removes surface dirt. Mobile detailing protects, restores, and preserves. Metro brings both to your driveway.

spokes.title: How Long Does a Car Detail Take? Honest Breakdown by Service
primary_keywords: how long does a car detail take
how long does car detailing take
secondary_keywords: how long does interior detail take
how long does full detail take
spokes.conversion_hook: Mobile detailing means your car gets done while you work, sleep, or do errands. No shop drop-off.
spokes.competition_gap: Very low competition. Most detailers do not answer this directly. A clear, honest time breakdown is genuinely useful and ranks for zero-competition long-tail.

spokes.title: What to Expect When You Book Mobile Detailing for the First Time
primary_keywords: what to expect mobile detailing
first time car detailing what to expect
spokes.conversion_hook: Metro handles everything. All you need is a water hookup and a parking spot.

clusters.rationale: Interior Detail ($200) is Metro's second highest-volume service. Blog posts educate on what's included and directly convert pet owners, parents, and car-seat-buyers.

hub_post.title: What's Actually Included in an Interior Car Detail?
primary_keywords: what is included in interior car detail
interior car detailing what's included
hub_post.conversion_hook: Metro's Interior Detail covers every surface, every vent, every crevice. $200 for cars, $240 for larger vehicles.
hub_post.cannibalization_risk: low - monitor if service page uses similar language; keep blog purely informational

spokes.title: How to Get Dog and Cat Hair Out of Your Car (Why a Vacuum Isn't Enough)
primary_keywords: pet hair removal from car seats
how to get dog hair out of car
spokes.conversion_hook: Pet hair embeds deep into upholstery fibers. Metro's pet hair removal add-on ($80) uses professional-grade tools that pull it out completely.
spokes.competition_gap: No Bakersfield-specific competitor has this post. Pet-owner angle is a strong differentiator.

spokes.title: How to Clean and Condition Leather Car Seats (And When to Call a Pro)
primary_keywords: how to clean leather car seats
leather seat conditioning how often
spokes.conversion_hook: Bakersfield's heat dries leather faster than most climates. Metro's leather conditioning add-on is $40 and takes 20 minutes.
spokes.notes: Bakersfield angle: 100F+ heat accelerates leather drying. This is genuinely useful local context.

clusters.rationale: These posts target niche, low-competition queries tied directly to Metro's add-on services. Headlight restoration alone is a $80 upsell that many customers don't know they need until they see the content.

how to fix foggy headlights
